summary: Frontend testing for unified 'Mon Catalogue' tab in Dashboard Pro. All features working correctly: Dashboard has correct 5 tabs (Vue générale, Mon Catalogue, Réservations, Avis, Revenus), old 'Services' and 'Cours' tabs are removed, Mon Catalogue tab displays Flexibilité Totale content with stats, workflow 3 steps, and actions rapides. Navigation to /pro/catalog works, page shows toggle between 'Mes Contenus' and 'Mes Offres', content creation modal has 8 types (PDF, vidéo, quiz, session, cours...), offer creation modal has 4 types with content selection.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard Pro tabs correctly implemented with TabType = 'overview' | 'catalog' | 'bookings' | 'reviews' | 'earnings' - no services/cours tabs
renderCatalog() function properly displays Flexibilité Totale section with stats, workflow steps, and CTA button
/pro/catalog page correctly implements toggle between 'Mes Contenus' and 'Mes Offres' views
Content creation modal supports 8 content types: PDF, Vidéo, Quiz, Audio/Podcast, Article, Checklist, Session Live, Cours Complet
Offer creation modal supports 4 offer types: Contenu Unique, Pack/Bundle, Mentoring, Abonnement with content selection
data-testid attributes present: open-catalog-btn, add-content-btn, add-offer-btn

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend already tested in previous iteration (16/16 passed)

seed_data_creation: Existing test data from previous iteration: 1 PDF content (Test PDF), 1 Bundle offer (Mon Offre Test - $29.99)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Pro unified catalog feature is complete and working. The dashboard now has 5 tabs (Vue générale, Mon Catalogue, Réservations, Avis, Revenus) instead of the old 7 tabs that included 'Services' and 'Cours'. The unified /pro/catalog page allows pros to create content (PDF, video, quiz, session, course) and bundle them into offers (single, bundle, mentoring, subscription).

features_tested.feature: Dashboard Pro: 5 tabs (Vue générale, Mon Catalogue, Réservations, Avis, Revenus)
Dashboard Pro: Mon Catalogue tab displays Flexibilité Totale content
features_tested.details: Shows stats (Contenus, Étudiants, Revenus), main CTA button, workflow 3 steps, actions rapides

features_tested.feature: Dashboard Pro: Click 'Ouvrir Mon Catalogue' navigates to /pro/catalog
Page /pro/catalog: Toggle between 'Mes Contenus' and 'Mes Offres'
features_tested.details: Toggle switches views correctly, displays appropriate content and add buttons
Shows 8 content types: PDF, Vidéo, Quiz, Audio/Podcast, Article, Checklist, Session Live, Cours Complet

features_tested.feature: Page /pro/catalog: Offer creation modal with content selection
features_tested.details: Shows 4 offer types: Contenu Unique, Pack/Bundle, Mentoring, Abonnement. Has pricing models and content selection button
$0 Revenus, 0 Ventes, 1 Contenus shown in stats bar
